lab card

var() mixed

neutral all + colored var left

var() right side

Should pass

oklch neutral

chroma 0 gray

oklch near-neutral

chroma 0.01

uniform border

1px too thin

lab neutral

chroma 0

--line resolves to gray

1px too thin to qualify
